person.name: Richwin de Charpeigne-Mousson

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
RICHWIN, son of LOUIS & his wife --- ([980/90]-after 1052).  "Henricus…rex" granted property "Suntheim in pago Durihin et in comitatu Riwini comitis" to the bishopric of Bamberg by charter dated 1 Nov 1007.  
A charter dated 1019, which records an agreement between Berthold Bishop of Toul and "Olricus miles", is subscribed by "Riquini comitis, Ludovicus comitis patris eius, item Ludovici filii eius, Theodorici fratris eius".  Comte de Charpeigne: Emperor Konrad II confirmed the properties of the convent of St Laurent at Dieulouard "in pago Scarpona in comitatu Richuini" by charter dated 2 May 1028.  Comte de Saintois.  "Rainardi comitis, Conradi comitis…comite Ricuino juniore" witnessed the charter of Brunon Bishop of Toul dated 1043 which confirms the foundation of the priory of Deuilly by "Galterius de Daguliaco cum…conjugis suæ Adilæ", another version of the same document being signed by "Valtheri comitis, Rainardi comitis, Odelrici comitis, alterius Odelrici comitis….  "Richuini comitis Segintensis, Haimonis comitis…Everardi de Sorceio…Gosberti de Asperomonte…Wiselonis fratris Theoderici Virdunensis episcopi…" witnessed the charter dated 17 Oct 1052 under which Udon Bishop of Toul regulated the avouerie of the abbey of Bleurville. 

m MATHILDE, daughter of ---.  The Gesta Episcoporum Tullensium names "Udonis" as successor of Bruno as Bishop of Toul and "pater eius comes Riquinus ex Reubariorum regione ortus, mater Mathildis ex Alemannia…genus".  She may have been Mathilde von Egisheim, daughter of Hugo [VIII] Graf im Nordgau und zu Egisheim & his wife Heilwig - if it is correct that her son Louis was the same person as Louis Comte de Mousson, and also if it is correct that Pope Leo IX was the maternal uncle of the latter as suggested by Picard.  
If this is correct, Mathilde would have been one of her parents´ older children considering the probable birth date of her son Louis. 

Richwin & his wife had three children: 

1.         LOUIS [II] (-after 1019).  A charter dated 1019, which records an agreement between Berthold Bishop of Toul and "Olricus miles", is subscribed by "Riquini comitis, Ludovicus comitis patris eius, item Ludovici filii eius, Theodorici fratris eius". same person as…?  LOUIS ([1015]-[29 Aug 1071/1076]).  Comte de Mousson.  This co-identity is proposed by Europäische Stammtafeln.  
It is true that it presents no chronological difficulties, but it is not the only theory which has been proposed to explain the origin of Louis Comte de Mousson. COMTES de BAR et de MOUSSON. 

2.   SIGEBODO (-after 15 Apr 1064).  Archbishop Poppo restored the monastery of St Matheus to Trier by charter dated 2 Sep 1038, witnessed by "Dux Gozelo et comes Gozelo, comes Arnulfus, comes Sigebodo…".  Heinrich IV King of Germany confirmed an exchange of property between Udo Bishop of Toul and the abbot of Kornelimünster which confirmed that "ipse episcopus et comes Sigebodo frater et advocatus capitis eius" gave "allodium suum Grusmithis in Hasbanio iuxta monasterium sancti Trudonis", by charter dated 15 Apr 1064, also signed by "…comes Sigebodo…"

3.         UDO ([1019][363]-24 Jul 1069).  The Gesta Episcoporum Tullensium records that “Udonis...pater eius...comes Riquinus ex Reubariorum regione ortus mater...eius Mathildis...ex Alemannia duxit genus” succeeded as bishop of Toul[364].  Bishop of Toul 1052.  "Richuini comitis Segintensis, Haimonis comitis, Arnulfi de Ignes, Odelrici de Novo-villare et fratris eius Herimanni, Arnulfi comitis de Sorceio, Everardi de Sorceio…Gosberti de Asperomonte…Wiselonis fratris Theoderici Virdunensis episcopi…" witnessed the charter dated 17 Oct 1052 under which Udon Bishop of Toul regulated the avouerie of the abbey of Bleurville[365].  The Gesta Episcoporum Tullensium records that “Udonis” held office for 18 years, died “pridie Id Jul” and was buried “in suæ sedis ecclesia”

zh.lifeSummary: 當Richwin de Charpeigne-Mousson於0995年出生在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒姆素時，他的父親Louis de Mousson comte de Mousson21歲，母親Adelaide de Saint Varne von Lützelburg26歲。他和Hildegard von Egisheim至少有3個兒子。他去世於1037年在法國福朗-可特艾度布斯蒙特貝利亞德享年42歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German Reichwein , translated into English as if it were composed of modern German reich ‘rich’ + Wein ‘wine’.

variants.name: Reichwein
meanings: German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Rīchwin, composed of the elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + win ‘friend’. Compare Richwine .

en.lifeSummary: When Richwin de Charpeigne-Mousson was born in 0995, in Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, his father, Louis de Mousson comte de Mousson, was 21 and his mother, Adelaide de Saint Varne von Lützelburg, was 26. He had at least 3 sons with Hildegard von Egisheim. He died in 1037, in Montbéliard, Doubs, Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richwin de Charpeigne-Mousson est né en 0995, à Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, son père, Louis de Mousson comte de Mousson, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Adelaide de Saint Varne von Lützelburg, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Hildegard von Egisheim. Il est décédé en 1037, à Montbéliard, Doubs, Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richwin de Charpeigne-Mousson 0995 in Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Louis de Mousson comte de Mousson 21 und seine Mutter Adelaide de Saint Varne von Lützelburg 26. Er hatte mit Hildegard von Egisheim mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1037 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Montbéliard, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richwin de Charpeigne-Mousson è nato il nel 0995 nel Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Louis de Mousson comte de Mousson, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Adelaide de Saint Varne von Lützelburg, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Hildegard von Egisheim. Morì nel 1037, nel Montbéliard, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richwin de Charpeigne-Moussonが0995年にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルモウソンで生まれた時，父Louis de Mousson comte de Moussonは21歳，母Adelaide de Saint Varne von Lützelburgは26歳であった。彼はHildegard von Egisheimとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1037年にフランスフランチェ-コムトeドウブズモントブeリアルドで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richwin de Charpeigne-Mousson(이)가 0995년 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 모우슨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Louis de Mousson comte de Mousson(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelaide de Saint Varne von Lützelburg(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Hildegard von Egisheim(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1037년 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 다브스 몽브e리아르드에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richwin de Charpeigne-Mousson nasceu em 0995, em Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Louis de Mousson comte de Mousson, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide de Saint Varne von Lützelburg, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Hildegard von Egisheim. Ele faleceu em 1037, em Montbéliard, Doubs, Franche-Comté, França, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richwin de Charpeigne-Mousson родился в 0995 г. в местности муссон, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Louis de Mousson comte de Mousson было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Adelaide de Saint Varne von Lützelburg, 26. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Hildegard von Egisheim. Он умер в 1037 г. в местности монтбeлярд, доубс, фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 42 лет.

sm.between 1015 and 1019: mai le 1015 e o'o I le 1019

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richwin de Charpeigne-Mousson nació en 0995, en Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Louis de Mousson comte de Mousson, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Adelaide de Saint Varne von Lützelburg, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Hildegard von Egisheim. Murió en 1037, en Montbéliard, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 42 años.
